name: medialog
title: Medialog
description: Browse the read, games, and watch lists in your Obsidian vault — log timestamped thoughts and update entry statuses
author: JMitnik

commands.name: log-media
commands.title: Log Media
commands.description: Browse your watch, games, and read lists, log timestamped thoughts, and update statuses
commands.subtitle: Your Media Diary

preferences.name: vaultPath
preferences.title: Obsidian Vault Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
